message:
feat(metrics): refuse public bind by default, require --dangerous-bind-any opt-in

Add is_localhost_bind check to MetricsServer::start that rejects
binding on non-loopback addresses unless with_dangerous_public_bind
is called. Thread a new --dangerous-bind-any CLI flag through the
watcher pipeline so operators must explicitly opt in to remotely
reachable metrics endpoints. Also fix the event_bus snapshot closure
to pass the bus by reference and use () pattern for the shutdown
future. Add tests covering localhost detection, public bind refusal,
and opt-in allowance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
